sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 84 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.27 2. For orders on CMA No.928/2024 3. For hearing of main case 07.05.2026 Messrs. Ameer Nausherwan Adil and Ghazi Khan Khalil, Asim Bin Majeed, Aftab Ali and Kumail Abbas, advocates for the applicant Messrs. Imran Iqbal Khan, Bilawal Solangi and Arif Manthar, advocates for respondent Learned counsel for the applicant states that this reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
